text: Based on the notice, decide whether the following statements are True (T) or False (F):
notice: GREEN COMMUNITY INITIATIVE. Join us this Saturday from 8:00 AM to 11:00 AM for our monthly river clean-up at Maple Park. Volunteers of all ages are welcome (under 12s must be accompanied by an adult). Gloves and trash bags will be provided on-site. Complimentary snacks and drinks will be served at 11:15 AM. Please scan the QR code to register by Thursday so we can estimate the supplies needed.

parts.text: The event is strictly limited to adults.
parts.solution: Thông báo ghi rõ 'Volunteers of all ages are welcome' (Tình nguyện viên mọi lứa tuổi đều được hoan nghênh), trẻ dưới 12 tuổi chỉ cần có người lớn đi kèm.

parts.text: Participants need to bring their own cleaning equipment.
parts.solution: Thông báo cho biết 'Gloves and trash bags will be provided on-site' (Găng tay và túi rác sẽ được cung cấp tại chỗ).

parts.text: Food and beverages will be available after the clean-up finishes.
parts.solution: Sự kiện dọn dẹp kết thúc lúc 11:00 AM và đồ ăn nhẹ miễn phí sẽ được phục vụ lúc 11:15 AM.

parts.text: You can register for the event on Friday morning.
parts.solution: Hạn chót đăng ký là thứ Năm ('register by Thursday').

text: Based on the advertisement, decide whether the following statements are True (T) or False (F):
notice: JOB ADVERTISEMENT: JUNIOR MARKETING EXECUTIVE. TechNova Solutions is looking for a creative individual to join our team! Requirements: Bachelor's degree in Marketing or related field. At least 1 year of experience in social media management. Fluency in English; knowledge of French is a plus. Benefits: Hybrid working model (3 days in office, 2 days remote). Comprehensive health insurance. Send your CV to hr@technova.com before November 20th.

parts.text: Applicants must have exactly three years of experience in the related field.
parts.solution: Yêu cầu kinh nghiệm là 'ít nhất 1 năm' (At least 1 year), không phải đúng 3 năm.

parts.text: Knowing how to speak French is a mandatory requirement for this position.
parts.solution: Tiếng Pháp chỉ là một điểm cộng ('knowledge of French is a plus'), không bắt buộc.

parts.text: The successful candidate will not have to work in the office every day.
parts.solution: Công ty áp dụng mô hình làm việc lai (Hybrid model), chỉ cần lên văn phòng 3 ngày/tuần.

parts.text: Applications should be submitted electronically via email.
parts.solution: Ứng viên được yêu cầu gửi CV qua địa chỉ email hr@technova.com.

text: Based on the policy notice, decide whether the following statements are True (T) or False (F):
notice: SCHOOL POLICY ON GENERATIVE AI. Effective immediately, the use of AI tools (like ChatGPT) is permitted for brainstorming and outlining purposes only. Students must not use AI to generate complete essays. Any AI assistance must be explicitly cited in the bibliography. Submitting AI-generated text as original work is considered academic dishonesty and will result in an automatic zero.

parts.text: The school has completely banned the use of AI platforms.
parts.solution: Việc sử dụng AI vẫn được cho phép đối với mục đích lên ý tưởng và lập dàn ý ('permitted for brainstorming and outlining purposes only').

parts.text: Students can use AI to write the final conclusion of their essays.
parts.solution: Học sinh không được dùng AI để tạo ra các bài luận hoàn chỉnh hoặc các phần viết hoàn chỉnh ('must not use AI to generate complete essays').

parts.text: If students use AI for ideas, they must declare it in their assignments.
parts.solution: Bất kỳ sự hỗ trợ nào từ AI cũng phải được trích dẫn rõ ràng ('must be explicitly cited').

parts.text: Plagiarizing from AI will lead to a failing grade for the assignment.
parts.solution: Nộp bài do AI viết sẽ bị coi là gian lận và nhận điểm 0 tự động ('result in an automatic zero').

text: Based on the update notice, decide whether the following statements are True (T) or False (F):
notice: ATTENTION: MUSIC FESTIVAL UPDATE. Due to unexpected heavy rain forecasts, the annual Summer Vibes Festival scheduled for this weekend (June 15-16) will be relocated from the Central Stadium to the Grand Exhibition Center. Operating hours remain unchanged (4 PM - 11 PM). Entry is free for children under 10; general admission is $15. Please note that all merchandise stalls will operate on a cashless basis.

parts.text: The festival's venue has been changed because of the weather.
parts.solution: Sự kiện phải đổi địa điểm do dự báo mưa lớn bất ngờ ('Due to unexpected heavy rain forecasts... will be relocated').

parts.text: The event will last for three consecutive days.
parts.solution: Sự kiện diễn ra vào cuối tuần này (ngày 15-16 tháng 6), tức là chỉ kéo dài 2 ngày.

parts.text: A twelve-year-old child must pay an entrance fee of $15.
parts.solution: Chỉ miễn phí cho trẻ dưới 10 tuổi. Trẻ 12 tuổi phải mua vé vào cổng chung (general admission) giá 15 đô la.

parts.text: Visitors can use paper money to buy souvenirs at the festival.
parts.solution: Tất cả các quầy bán hàng lưu niệm sẽ hoạt động không dùng tiền mặt ('cashless basis').

text: Based on the message, decide whether the following statements are True (T) or False (F):
notice: To all Gym Members, Starting next month, FitLife Center will increase its monthly subscription fee from $30 to $35. This adjustment allows us to upgrade our cardio equipment and extend our operating hours to 24/7. Members who have paid for an annual plan in advance will not be affected until their current cycle expires. Thank you for your understanding. Management Team

parts.text: The gym is reducing its prices to attract more members.
parts.solution: Phòng gym đang tăng phí đăng ký hàng tháng ('increase its monthly subscription fee'), không phải giảm giá.

parts.text: The additional money will be used to buy new exercise machines.
parts.solution: Sự điều chỉnh này giúp họ có chi phí nâng cấp thiết bị tập tim mạch ('upgrade our cardio equipment').

parts.text: The fitness center will soon be open all day and night.
parts.solution: Giờ hoạt động sẽ được kéo dài thành 24/7 ('extend our operating hours to 24/7').

parts.text: Annual subscribers must pay the extra $5 immediately next month.
parts.solution: Hội viên đã trả trước gói năm sẽ không bị ảnh hưởng cho đến khi chu kỳ hiện tại hết hạn ('will not be affected until their current cycle expires').

text: Based on the advertisement, decide whether the following statements are True (T) or False (F):
notice: E-WASTE RECYCLING CAMPAIGN. Don't throw away your old gadgets! Drop them off at the Main Library parking lot from Monday to Friday next week. We accept laptops, smartphones, and chargers. (Note: Large home appliances like washing machines are prohibited). Please ensure all personal data is permanently wiped from your devices before drop-off. Every participant will receive a 10% discount voucher for the City Bookstore.

parts.text: You can donate your broken refrigerator at this event.
parts.solution: Các thiết bị gia dụng lớn như máy giặt, tủ lạnh bị cấm mang đến ('Large home appliances... are prohibited').

parts.text: The collection point is open on weekends.
parts.solution: Điểm thu gom chỉ mở từ Thứ Hai đến Thứ Sáu ('Monday to Friday').

parts.text: Participants are responsible for deleting their own information from the devices.
parts.solution: Người tham gia phải tự đảm bảo xóa sạch dữ liệu cá nhân trước khi nộp ('ensure all personal data is permanently wiped').

parts.text: Donors will be rewarded with a coupon for buying books.
parts.solution: Mỗi người tham gia sẽ nhận được một phiếu giảm giá 10% cho cửa hàng sách thành phố.

text: Based on the email, decide whether the following statements are True (T) or False (F):
notice: From: David Lee. To: Sales Team. Subject: Urgent: Rescheduling today's pitch. Hi team, I'm experiencing a severe internet outage in my area due to a downed cable. Consequently, I won't be able to host the client presentation via Zoom at 2:00 PM today. Let's postpone it to tomorrow at 10:00 AM. I have attached the final slide deck. Please review the sales figures on slide 10 and let me know if any numbers need tweaking. Best, David

parts.text: The online meeting was cancelled because David was sick.
parts.solution: Cuộc họp bị hoãn do sự cố mất mạng internet cục bộ ('severe internet outage'), không phải do David bị ốm.

parts.text: The presentation has been shifted to the morning of the following day.
parts.solution: Buổi thuyết trình được dời sang 10:00 sáng ngày mai ('postpone it to tomorrow at 10:00 AM').

parts.text: David has sent the completed presentation slides along with the email.
parts.solution: David đã đính kèm bộ slide hoàn chỉnh trong email ('attached the final slide deck').

parts.text: David wants the team to completely rewrite the entire presentation.
parts.solution: David chỉ yêu cầu nhóm xem xét lại các số liệu bán hàng ở slide số 10 ('review the sales figures on slide 10').

text: Question 8 is based on the information in the passage. Decide if the statements are True (T) or False (F):
passage: The integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) into the workplace has ignited a profound transformation, shifting the paradigm from manual automation to cognitive collaboration. Unlike previous industrial revolutions that primarily replaced physical labor, the current AI wave threatens to disrupt white-collar professions. Routine tasks such as data entry and preliminary coding are increasingly being outsourced to algorithms. However, economists argue that viewing AI solely as a job destroyer is a reductive stance. Instead of mass unemployment, we are witnessing a structural realignment of the workforce. The rise of AI has catalyzed the creation of entirely new professions. For instance, 'prompt engineering', the skill of crafting precise inputs to elicit optimal outputs from AI, has emerged as a highly lucrative role. [A] Furthermore, AI acts as an augmentation tool, empowering professionals to transcend mundane tasks and focus on strategic, creative endeavors. [B] Doctors, for example, can leverage AI to rapidly analyze medical scans, allowing them more time for patient care. [C] Despite the optimistic outlook, this transition is not devoid of challenges. The most pressing issue is the widening 'skills gap.' As AI takes over routine cognitive work, the demand for advanced technical literacy and uniquely human soft skills is skyrocketing. [D] Educational institutions are currently struggling to update their curricula at a pace that matches technological advancement, leaving many recent graduates ill-equipped for the modern workplace. To navigate this turbulent landscape, a culture of lifelong learning must be cultivated. Corporate retraining programs are no longer a perk but a necessity for survival. Ultimately, the future of work will not be defined by humans competing against machines, but by humans working harmoniously alongside them.

parts.text: Previous industrial revolutions mainly replaced physical human labor.
parts.solution: Đoạn văn nêu rõ: 'Unlike previous industrial revolutions that primarily replaced physical labor' (Khác với các cuộc CMCN trước đây chủ yếu thay thế lao động chân tay).

parts.text: Generative AI models pose a significant threat to blue-collar manufacturing jobs.
parts.solution: Làn sóng AI hiện tại đe dọa làm gián đoạn các ngành nghề văn phòng, trí thức ('white-collar professions'), không phải công nhân nhà máy.

parts.text: Basic coding and data entry are immune to AI automation.
parts.solution: Những công việc này đang ngày càng bị thuê ngoài cho các thuật toán AI ('increasingly being outsourced to algorithms'), do đó chúng không hề được miễn nhiễm.

parts.text: Economists completely agree that AI is strictly a job-destroying technology.
parts.solution: Các nhà kinh tế cho rằng việc chỉ coi AI là kẻ hủy diệt việc làm là một quan điểm phiến diện, sai lầm ('a reductive stance').

text: Question 9 is based on the information in the passage. Decide if the statements are True (T) or False (F):
passage: The integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) into the workplace has ignited a profound transformation, shifting the paradigm from manual automation to cognitive collaboration. Unlike previous industrial revolutions that primarily replaced physical labor, the current AI wave threatens to disrupt white-collar professions. Routine tasks such as data entry and preliminary coding are increasingly being outsourced to algorithms. However, economists argue that viewing AI solely as a job destroyer is a reductive stance. Instead of mass unemployment, we are witnessing a structural realignment of the workforce. The rise of AI has catalyzed the creation of entirely new professions. For instance, 'prompt engineering', the skill of crafting precise inputs to elicit optimal outputs from AI, has emerged as a highly lucrative role. [A] Furthermore, AI acts as an augmentation tool, empowering professionals to transcend mundane tasks and focus on strategic, creative endeavors. [B] Doctors, for example, can leverage AI to rapidly analyze medical scans, allowing them more time for patient care. [C] Despite the optimistic outlook, this transition is not devoid of challenges. The most pressing issue is the widening 'skills gap.' As AI takes over routine cognitive work, the demand for advanced technical literacy and uniquely human soft skills is skyrocketing. [D] Educational institutions are currently struggling to update their curricula at a pace that matches technological advancement, leaving many recent graduates ill-equipped for the modern workplace. To navigate this turbulent landscape, a culture of lifelong learning must be cultivated. Corporate retraining programs are no longer a perk but a necessity for survival. Ultimately, the future of work will not be defined by humans competing against machines, but by humans working harmoniously alongside them.

parts.text: AI integration has resulted in the total elimination of the workforce.
parts.solution: Tác giả khẳng định thay vì thất nghiệp hàng loạt, chúng ta đang chứng kiến sự tái cấu trúc lực lượng lao động ('Instead of mass unemployment, we are witnessing a structural realignment').

parts.text: 'Prompt engineering' is a new profession created as a direct result of AI advancement.
parts.solution: Sự trỗi dậy của AI đã xúc tác tạo ra các nghề nghiệp hoàn toàn mới, trong đó có 'prompt engineering'.

parts.text: AI tools restrict professionals from engaging in creative work.
parts.solution: Ngược lại, AI trao quyền cho các chuyên gia thoát khỏi các công việc nhàm chán để tập trung vào các nỗ lực sáng tạo ('focus on strategic, creative endeavors').

parts.text: Medical professionals can use AI to speed up the analysis of patient scans.
parts.solution: Bác sĩ có thể tận dụng AI để phân tích nhanh chóng các hình ảnh y khoa chụp chiếu ('rapidly analyze medical scans').

text: Which sentence best summarizes the main idea of the passage?
passage: The integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) into the workplace has ignited a profound transformation, shifting the paradigm from manual automation to cognitive collaboration. Unlike previous industrial revolutions that primarily replaced physical labor, the current AI wave threatens to disrupt white-collar professions. Routine tasks such as data entry and preliminary coding are increasingly being outsourced to algorithms. However, economists argue that viewing AI solely as a job destroyer is a reductive stance. Instead of mass unemployment, we are witnessing a structural realignment of the workforce. The rise of AI has catalyzed the creation of entirely new professions. For instance, 'prompt engineering', the skill of crafting precise inputs to elicit optimal outputs from AI, has emerged as a highly lucrative role. [A] Furthermore, AI acts as an augmentation tool, empowering professionals to transcend mundane tasks and focus on strategic, creative endeavors. [B] Doctors, for example, can leverage AI to rapidly analyze medical scans, allowing them more time for patient care. [C] Despite the optimistic outlook, this transition is not devoid of challenges. The most pressing issue is the widening 'skills gap.' As AI takes over routine cognitive work, the demand for advanced technical literacy and uniquely human soft skills is skyrocketing. [D] Educational institutions are currently struggling to update their curricula at a pace that matches technological advancement, leaving many recent graduates ill-equipped for the modern workplace. To navigate this turbulent landscape, a culture of lifelong learning must be cultivated. Corporate retraining programs are no longer a perk but a necessity for survival. Ultimately, the future of work will not be defined by humans competing against machines, but by humans working harmoniously alongside them.

options.text: The technological mechanisms behind generative AI models.
The impact of AI on the workplace, its challenges, and necessary adaptations.
Why educational institutions are failing to teach modern technology.
The history of industrial revolutions and their effect on manual labor.

solution: Văn bản thảo luận toàn diện về tác động của AI đối với công việc, những thách thức phát sinh như khoảng trống kỹ năng, và các giải pháp thích ứng cần thiết như đào tạo lại và học tập suốt đời.

text: The word 'transcend' in the passage is closest in meaning to:
passage: The integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) into the workplace has ignited a profound transformation, shifting the paradigm from manual automation to cognitive collaboration. Unlike previous industrial revolutions that primarily replaced physical labor, the current AI wave threatens to disrupt white-collar professions. Routine tasks such as data entry and preliminary coding are increasingly being outsourced to algorithms. However, economists argue that viewing AI solely as a job destroyer is a reductive stance. Instead of mass unemployment, we are witnessing a structural realignment of the workforce. The rise of AI has catalyzed the creation of entirely new professions. For instance, 'prompt engineering', the skill of crafting precise inputs to elicit optimal outputs from AI, has emerged as a highly lucrative role. [A] Furthermore, AI acts as an augmentation tool, empowering professionals to transcend mundane tasks and focus on strategic, creative endeavors. [B] Doctors, for example, can leverage AI to rapidly analyze medical scans, allowing them more time for patient care. [C] Despite the optimistic outlook, this transition is not devoid of challenges. The most pressing issue is the widening 'skills gap.' As AI takes over routine cognitive work, the demand for advanced technical literacy and uniquely human soft skills is skyrocketing. [D] Educational institutions are currently struggling to update their curricula at a pace that matches technological advancement, leaving many recent graduates ill-equipped for the modern workplace. To navigate this turbulent landscape, a culture of lifelong learning must be cultivated. Corporate retraining programs are no longer a perk but a necessity for survival. Ultimately, the future of work will not be defined by humans competing against machines, but by humans working harmoniously alongside them.

options.text: go beyond
fall behind
focus on
struggle with

solution: 'Transcend' có nghĩa là vượt qua, vượt lên trên giới hạn. Trong ngữ cảnh này, AI giúp con người vượt qua các công việc nhàm chán (mundane tasks). Từ đồng nghĩa phù hợp nhất là 'go beyond'.

text: The word 'them' in the passage refers to:
passage: The integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) into the workplace has ignited a profound transformation, shifting the paradigm from manual automation to cognitive collaboration. Unlike previous industrial revolutions that primarily replaced physical labor, the current AI wave threatens to disrupt white-collar professions. Routine tasks such as data entry and preliminary coding are increasingly being outsourced to algorithms. However, economists argue that viewing AI solely as a job destroyer is a reductive stance. Instead of mass unemployment, we are witnessing a structural realignment of the workforce. The rise of AI has catalyzed the creation of entirely new professions. For instance, 'prompt engineering', the skill of crafting precise inputs to elicit optimal outputs from AI, has emerged as a highly lucrative role. [A] Furthermore, AI acts as an augmentation tool, empowering professionals to transcend mundane tasks and focus on strategic, creative endeavors. [B] Doctors, for example, can leverage AI to rapidly analyze medical scans, allowing them more time for patient care. [C] Despite the optimistic outlook, this transition is not devoid of challenges. The most pressing issue is the widening 'skills gap.' As AI takes over routine cognitive work, the demand for advanced technical literacy and uniquely human soft skills is skyrocketing. [D] Educational institutions are currently struggling to update their curricula at a pace that matches technological advancement, leaving many recent graduates ill-equipped for the modern workplace. To navigate this turbulent landscape, a culture of lifelong learning must be cultivated. Corporate retraining programs are no longer a perk but a necessity for survival. Ultimately, the future of work will not be defined by humans competing against machines, but by humans working harmoniously alongside them.

options.text: AI models
creative endeavors
Doctors
patient care

solution: Đại từ 'them' nằm trong cấu trúc 'allowing them more time'. Nó thay thế cho danh từ số nhiều chỉ người đứng ngay trước đó là 'Doctors' (Các bác sĩ).

text: According to the passage, what is the primary cause of the widening 'skills gap'?
passage: The integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) into the workplace has ignited a profound transformation, shifting the paradigm from manual automation to cognitive collaboration. Unlike previous industrial revolutions that primarily replaced physical labor, the current AI wave threatens to disrupt white-collar professions. Routine tasks such as data entry and preliminary coding are increasingly being outsourced to algorithms. However, economists argue that viewing AI solely as a job destroyer is a reductive stance. Instead of mass unemployment, we are witnessing a structural realignment of the workforce. The rise of AI has catalyzed the creation of entirely new professions. For instance, 'prompt engineering', the skill of crafting precise inputs to elicit optimal outputs from AI, has emerged as a highly lucrative role. [A] Furthermore, AI acts as an augmentation tool, empowering professionals to transcend mundane tasks and focus on strategic, creative endeavors. [B] Doctors, for example, can leverage AI to rapidly analyze medical scans, allowing them more time for patient care. [C] Despite the optimistic outlook, this transition is not devoid of challenges. The most pressing issue is the widening 'skills gap.' As AI takes over routine cognitive work, the demand for advanced technical literacy and uniquely human soft skills is skyrocketing. [D] Educational institutions are currently struggling to update their curricula at a pace that matches technological advancement, leaving many recent graduates ill-equipped for the modern workplace. To navigate this turbulent landscape, a culture of lifelong learning must be cultivated. Corporate retraining programs are no longer a perk but a necessity for survival. Ultimately, the future of work will not be defined by humans competing against machines, but by humans working harmoniously alongside them.

options.text: Workers are refusing to learn new soft skills.
AI is taking over routine tasks, increasing the need for advanced technical and soft skills.
Companies are cutting budgets for employee training programs.
Recent graduates are not interested in the modern workplace.

solution: Văn bản giải thích khoảng trống kỹ năng xảy ra do 'AI takes over routine cognitive work', dẫn đến nhu cầu về trình độ kỹ thuật cao và các kỹ năng mềm đặc trưng của con người tăng vọt.

text: In which space (marked [A], [B], [C], or [D] in the passage) will the following sentence fit? 'This specific expertise requires a deep understanding of both linguistics and machine learning.'
passage: The integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) into the workplace has ignited a profound transformation, shifting the paradigm from manual automation to cognitive collaboration. Unlike previous industrial revolutions that primarily replaced physical labor, the current AI wave threatens to disrupt white-collar professions. Routine tasks such as data entry and preliminary coding are increasingly being outsourced to algorithms. However, economists argue that viewing AI solely as a job destroyer is a reductive stance. Instead of mass unemployment, we are witnessing a structural realignment of the workforce. The rise of AI has catalyzed the creation of entirely new professions. For instance, 'prompt engineering', the skill of crafting precise inputs to elicit optimal outputs from AI, has emerged as a highly lucrative role. [A] Furthermore, AI acts as an augmentation tool, empowering professionals to transcend mundane tasks and focus on strategic, creative endeavors. [B] Doctors, for example, can leverage AI to rapidly analyze medical scans, allowing them more time for patient care. [C] Despite the optimistic outlook, this transition is not devoid of challenges. The most pressing issue is the widening 'skills gap.' As AI takes over routine cognitive work, the demand for advanced technical literacy and uniquely human soft skills is skyrocketing. [D] Educational institutions are currently struggling to update their curricula at a pace that matches technological advancement, leaving many recent graduates ill-equipped for the modern workplace. To navigate this turbulent landscape, a culture of lifelong learning must be cultivated. Corporate retraining programs are no longer a perk but a necessity for survival. Ultimately, the future of work will not be defined by humans competing against machines, but by humans working harmoniously alongside them.
solution: Câu cần điền nói về 'chuyên môn cụ thể này' (This specific expertise) đòi hỏi hiểu biết về ngôn ngữ học và học máy. Nó bổ nghĩa trực tiếp cho nghề 'prompt engineering' vừa được giới thiệu ở câu trước, do đó vị trí [A] là hợp lý nhất.

text: Which of the following can be inferred from the passage?
passage: The integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) into the workplace has ignited a profound transformation, shifting the paradigm from manual automation to cognitive collaboration. Unlike previous industrial revolutions that primarily replaced physical labor, the current AI wave threatens to disrupt white-collar professions. Routine tasks such as data entry and preliminary coding are increasingly being outsourced to algorithms. However, economists argue that viewing AI solely as a job destroyer is a reductive stance. Instead of mass unemployment, we are witnessing a structural realignment of the workforce. The rise of AI has catalyzed the creation of entirely new professions. For instance, 'prompt engineering', the skill of crafting precise inputs to elicit optimal outputs from AI, has emerged as a highly lucrative role. [A] Furthermore, AI acts as an augmentation tool, empowering professionals to transcend mundane tasks and focus on strategic, creative endeavors. [B] Doctors, for example, can leverage AI to rapidly analyze medical scans, allowing them more time for patient care. [C] Despite the optimistic outlook, this transition is not devoid of challenges. The most pressing issue is the widening 'skills gap.' As AI takes over routine cognitive work, the demand for advanced technical literacy and uniquely human soft skills is skyrocketing. [D] Educational institutions are currently struggling to update their curricula at a pace that matches technological advancement, leaving many recent graduates ill-equipped for the modern workplace. To navigate this turbulent landscape, a culture of lifelong learning must be cultivated. Corporate retraining programs are no longer a perk but a necessity for survival. Ultimately, the future of work will not be defined by humans competing against machines, but by humans working harmoniously alongside them.

options.text: Governments are currently doing too much to help displaced workers.
Humans will eventually have to compete violently against machines for jobs.
Relying solely on university degrees is no longer sufficient for long-term career survival.
Corporate retraining programs should be optional perks for top employees.

solution: Văn bản nhấn mạnh 'văn hóa học tập suốt đời phải được nuôi dưỡng' và các chương trình đào tạo lại là 'sự tất yếu để sinh tồn', suy ra bằng đại học ban đầu không còn đủ để bảo đảm sự nghiệp lâu dài.

text: Match the sentence beginnings (Left) with the most suitable conversational responses (Right).

leftItems.text: Could you give me a hand with this heavy box?
I'm terribly sorry for stepping on your foot.
What a breathtaking performance you delivered tonight!
How about going out for dinner to celebrate your promotion?

rightItems.text: Sure, I'll grab the other end.
It really doesn't matter, don't worry.
I'm glad you enjoyed it.
That sounds like a brilliant idea!
Yes, I completely agree with you.
I don't think that's a good excuse.

solution: 1-A (Nhờ vả -> Đồng ý giúp); 2-B (Xin lỗi -> Bỏ qua, thông cảm); 3-C (Khen ngợi -> Cảm ơn lịch sự); 4-D (Đề nghị -> Hào hứng đồng ý).

text: Match the sentence beginnings featuring grammatical inversions (Left) with their correct endings (Right).

leftItems.text: Not until the consequences of climate change became undeniably severe
Hardly had the government implemented the new environmental regulations
Only by adopting a strict circular economy model
Were it not for the rapid advancements in green technology

rightItems.text: did global leaders start taking drastic actions.
when several heavy industry factories faced closure.
can nations hope to achieve sustainable development.
the transition to renewable energy would be impossible.
than industrial emissions saw a significant drop.
had the company reduced its carbon footprint.

solution: 1-A (Cấu trúc Not until... did + S + V); 2-B (Cấu trúc Hardly had + S + V3... when + S + V2); 3-C (Cấu trúc Only by + V-ing... can + S + V); 4-D (Đảo ngữ câu điều kiện loại 2: Were it not for + N... S + would + V).

text: Match the sentence beginnings featuring relative clauses or participial phrases (Left) with their logical endings (Right).

leftItems.text: The newly released smartphone, equipped with cutting-edge AI features,
The tech startup is developing an advanced algorithm,
Exhausted by the long hours of coding,
The software developer, whose latest app went viral globally,

rightItems.text: has quickly become the best-selling model this year.
which aims to bridge the digital divide in rural areas.
the software engineer finally decided to take a vacation.
was invited to speak at the international tech summit.
who recently won a prestigious award for innovation.
that guarantees absolute data privacy for users.

solution: 1-A (Chủ ngữ cần động từ chính 'has become'); 2-B (Mệnh đề quan hệ không xác định 'which' bổ sung nghĩa cho 'algorithm'); 3-C (Rút gọn mệnh đề chỉ nguyên nhân, vế sau cần chủ ngữ chỉ người 'the software engineer'); 4-D (Mệnh đề quan hệ 'whose' chen giữa, cần động từ chính 'was invited' để hoàn thành câu).

text: Match the sentence beginnings focusing on English collocations (Left) with their appropriate endings (Right).

leftItems.text: In order to stay competitive, companies must constantly upgrade
The rapid rise of automation will inevitably pose
Many teenagers today struggle to strike
Governments are launching campaigns to raise

rightItems.text: their technological infrastructure.
a significant threat to manual laborers.
a healthy balance between study and screen time.
public awareness about the dangers of cyberbullying.
the heavy burden on healthcare systems.
a profound impact on global communication.

solution: 1-A (Collocation: upgrade infrastructure - nâng cấp cơ sở hạ tầng); 2-B (Collocation: pose a threat to - đặt ra mối đe dọa); 3-C (Collocation: strike a balance - đạt được sự cân bằng); 4-D (Collocation: raise awareness - nâng cao nhận thức).

text: Match the sentence beginnings focusing on transitions and complex clauses (Left) with their logical endings (Right).

leftItems.text: Due to the mass migration of young adults to urban centers,
The local council decided to construct more green spaces;
Despite the undeniable convenience of online shopping,
Many traditional retail stores failed to adapt to the digital era,

rightItems.text: many rural villages are experiencing an aging population.
consequently, the air quality in the city center has improved.
a large number of consumers still prefer examining products in person.
resulting in a wave of unexpected bankruptcies.
therefore, online transactions have skyrocketed.
because they lacked sufficient financial resources.

solution: 1-A (Nguyên nhân - kết quả: giới trẻ rời đi làm nông thôn già hóa); 2-B (Dấu chấm phẩy kết hợp 'consequently' chỉ hệ quả trực tiếp); 3-C (Mệnh đề nhượng bộ 'Despite' kéo theo vế sau thể hiện sự trái ngược); 4-D (Mệnh đề phân từ 'resulting in...' mô tả hậu quả của việc không thích nghi được thời đại số).

passage: The traditional 9-to-5 workday is no longer the only path to a successful career. Today, the gig economy is catching (21) ______ rapidly, especially among younger generations. Freelancers appreciate the flexibility to work from anywhere, yet this lifestyle is not (22) ______ its drawbacks. One major concern is the lack of job security and benefits like health insurance. Furthermore, independent contractors often find (23) ______ working longer hours to meet erratic deadlines. Despite these challenges, the appeal of being one's own boss continues to (24) ______ millions into the freelance market. Ultimately, whether this trend will completely replace traditional employment remains to be (25) ______.
text: Fill in ONE word which best fits gap (21):
solution: Cụm động từ (Phrasal verb) 'catch on' có nghĩa là trở nên phổ biến, thịnh hành.

passage: The traditional 9-to-5 workday is no longer the only path to a successful career. Today, the gig economy is catching (21) ______ rapidly, especially among younger generations. Freelancers appreciate the flexibility to work from anywhere, yet this lifestyle is not (22) ______ its drawbacks. One major concern is the lack of job security and benefits like health insurance. Furthermore, independent contractors often find (23) ______ working longer hours to meet erratic deadlines. Despite these challenges, the appeal of being one's own boss continues to (24) ______ millions into the freelance market. Ultimately, whether this trend will completely replace traditional employment remains to be (25) ______.
text: Fill in ONE word which best fits gap (22):
solution: Cụm từ cố định 'not without its drawbacks' có nghĩa là 'không phải là không có những mặt hạn chế'.

passage: The traditional 9-to-5 workday is no longer the only path to a successful career. Today, the gig economy is catching (21) ______ rapidly, especially among younger generations. Freelancers appreciate the flexibility to work from anywhere, yet this lifestyle is not (22) ______ its drawbacks. One major concern is the lack of job security and benefits like health insurance. Furthermore, independent contractors often find (23) ______ working longer hours to meet erratic deadlines. Despite these challenges, the appeal of being one's own boss continues to (24) ______ millions into the freelance market. Ultimately, whether this trend will completely replace traditional employment remains to be (25) ______.
text: Fill in ONE word which best fits gap (23):
solution: Cấu trúc 'find oneself doing something' (tự nhận ra bản thân đang làm gì). Chủ ngữ 'independent contractors' là số nhiều nên đại từ phản thân tương ứng là 'themselves'.

passage: The traditional 9-to-5 workday is no longer the only path to a successful career. Today, the gig economy is catching (21) ______ rapidly, especially among younger generations. Freelancers appreciate the flexibility to work from anywhere, yet this lifestyle is not (22) ______ its drawbacks. One major concern is the lack of job security and benefits like health insurance. Furthermore, independent contractors often find (23) ______ working longer hours to meet erratic deadlines. Despite these challenges, the appeal of being one's own boss continues to (24) ______ millions into the freelance market. Ultimately, whether this trend will completely replace traditional employment remains to be (25) ______.
text: Fill in ONE word which best fits gap (24):
solution: Động từ nguyên thể đi sau 'continues to' mang nghĩa thu hút, lôi kéo. Các từ 'attract', 'draw', hoặc 'pull' đều phù hợp với ngữ cảnh.

passage: The traditional 9-to-5 workday is no longer the only path to a successful career. Today, the gig economy is catching (21) ______ rapidly, especially among younger generations. Freelancers appreciate the flexibility to work from anywhere, yet this lifestyle is not (22) ______ its drawbacks. One major concern is the lack of job security and benefits like health insurance. Furthermore, independent contractors often find (23) ______ working longer hours to meet erratic deadlines. Despite these challenges, the appeal of being one's own boss continues to (24) ______ millions into the freelance market. Ultimately, whether this trend will completely replace traditional employment remains to be (25) ______.
text: Fill in ONE word which best fits gap (25):
solution: Thành ngữ (Idiom) 'remains to be seen' có nghĩa là vẫn còn phải chờ xem, chưa thể biết chắc chắn điều gì sẽ xảy ra.
